case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. PAUL HARRY STEELE

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEELE, PAUL HARRY SBN 72798 $3,147.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,372.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT STEELE, PAUL HARRY SBN 72798 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
